faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about HOOKLY

items.question: How does HOOKLY verify freelancers?
items.answer: Every freelancer goes through a multi-step verification process including identity verification, skill assessments, and portfolio review. Only the top 10% of applicants are accepted.

items.question: What are the platform fees?
items.answer: HOOKLY charges a flat 10% fee on successful projects. There are no hidden fees, and posting projects is completely free.

items.question: How does the escrow system work?
items.answer: When you hire a freelancer, funds are held securely in escrow. Payment is only released when you approve the deliverables, protecting both parties.

items.question: Can I hire for ongoing projects?
items.answer: Yes! HOOKLY supports both one-time projects and ongoing engagements. You can set up recurring milestones and payments.

items.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the work?
items.answer: Our satisfaction guarantee means you can request revisions or dispute the work. Our support team will help mediate and find a fair solution.

awards.title: HOOKLY Awards
awards.heroSubtitle: We recognize those who make it happen.
awards.heroDescription: HOOKLY plaques celebrate real milestones achieved on the platform — our way of honoring those who scale with consistency and quality.
awards.recognitionDescription: At HOOKLY, results come from consistency, quality, and delivery. Our awards program exists to value those who grow ethically, meet deadlines, and build reputation — project after project.
awards.awardsSubtitle: With each milestone reached, you unlock a new level of recognition. The plaques represent evolution and constancy — not just volume.

1.title: Level 1 — Starter
1.description: First milestone: started building traction and reputation.

2.title: Level 2 — Blue
2.description: Consistency: recurring deliveries and solid growth.

3.title: Level 3 — Bronze
3.description: Scale: results that show professional maturity.

4.title: Level 4 — Gold
4.description: High performance: quality + volume with stability.

5.title: Level 5 — Black
5.description: Elite: a reference within the HOOKLY community.

rules.1: Only confirmed values within HOOKLY count toward the milestone.
rules.2: Transactions with disputes, chargebacks, or fraud may be excluded.
rules.3: We may request data confirmation before shipping.
rules.4: Delivery/production time may vary by region and logistics.
rules.5: The program may be adjusted to maintain fairness and transparency.

awards.faqSubtitle: Get your questions answered about the awards program

1.question: How do I earn a plaque?
1.answer: By reaching a confirmed result milestone on HOOKLY, according to program rules.

2.question: What counts toward the calculation?
2.answer: Confirmed payments from completed projects on the platform.

3.question: Do cancellations count?
3.answer: No, only confirmed and eligible results count.

4.question: When do I receive it?
4.answer: After validation and shipping confirmation, within the program's stated timeframe.

5.question: Can I track my progress?
5.answer: Yes — you can track your progress directly on the platform dashboard.

awards.ctaDescription: Join the HOOKLY community and start building your success story.
